options.responseData: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: $('Build Response').first().json.ok, activity_id: $('Build Response').first().json.activity_id, consent: $('Build Response').first().json.consent, error: $('Build Response').first().json.error || null }) }}

nodes.name: Activity Webhook (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Body: { agent_id (uuid), client_id (uuid), activity_type, metadata, duration_minutes, client_token }. Writes only if team_members.productivity_tracking_consent = true; otherwise returns ok:true with consent:false and discards the event.

nodes.name: Schedule Aggregator (DEACTIVATED)
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Every 15 min, backfills activity_log from outreach_log + appointment_log + scan_errors for consenting agents. Complements the webhook path (which covers real-time events).

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ p_agent_id: $json.agent_id, p_client_id: $json.client_id, p_activity_type: $json.activity_type, p_metadata: $json.metadata, p_duration_min: $json.duration, p_started_at: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.name: Heuristic Classify
nodes.notes: Best-effort pre-classification. Claude classifier runs later in a batch job for items that stay 'unknown'.
